appliedUpdates.description: Updated architecture.md Layout Conventions to document that tab bar is also hidden on /products/* and /events/* detail pages (not just auth and admin pages)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify press feedback convention: Accept both Tailwind `active:scale-[0.98]` classes AND motion `whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}` as valid approaches. whileTap is preferred for elements already using motion components, while Tailwind active: is acceptable for simpler elements. Currently AGENTS.md only documents whileTap.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature skeleton-loading-and-transitions predominantly used Tailwind active:scale-[0.98] on ProductCard, MatchCard, BasketballCard, ConcertCard instead of the documented whileTap pattern. Both work correctly but the convention is unclear.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention for skeleton-to-content transitions: All data-fetching pages should use AnimatePresence mode='wait' with keyed m.div wrappers around loading/content states for smooth cross-fade. Simple conditional early returns should be avoided for consistency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: 4 of 5 tab pages (/, /football, /basketball, /concert) use AnimatePresence cross-fade pattern, but /my page uses simple early return without cross-fade. Inconsistency was flagged in skeleton-loading-and-transitions review.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Expand semantic token guidance to explicitly cover neutral/gray colors. Current guidance says 'ALWAYS use semantic token classes' with examples only for brand colors (text-primary, bg-accent). Workers may not realize gray utilities (bg-gray-100, text-gray-400) should also use surface-*/muted-* tokens.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: EmptyState component (toast-modal-empty-states feature) uses bg-gray-100, text-gray-400, text-gray-900 instead of semantic surface/muted tokens despite tailwind.config.ts defining them.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document known limitation: toast notifications shown before signOut() redirect may not be visible to users due to page navigation destroying the toast DOM. Recommend using a cookie or query parameter approach to show toasts on the destination page after redirect.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: app/my/page.tsx:63 calls showToast() immediately before signOut({ callbackUrl: '/login' }), which triggers redirect. The toast is briefly created then destroyed.
